---
pagetitle: "Agentic Basics"
title: "[Agentic Basics]{.amber}"
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-color: "#2C3E50"
  data-background-image: figs/banner.png
  data-background-size: 24%
  data-background-position: right 20% center
  class: dark-centered
  style: text-align:left;
---

## About {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/about.qmd >}}

## [Section 1]{.amber}<br>Assistants vs Agents {.dark-centered .center}

## The opening problem {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s1-opening-problem.qmd >}}

## Two terms, one distinction {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s1-two-terms.qmd >}}

## Agent = Model + Harness {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s1-agent-equation.qmd >}}

## Three shifts of focus {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s1-evolution.qmd >}}

## When to use which {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s1-when-to-use.qmd >}}

## [Section 2]{.amber}<br>Architecture {.dark-centered .center}

## Two kinds of directories {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s2-two-directories.qmd >}}

## Quick install {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s2-quick-install.qmd >}}

## The four components {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s2-four-components.qmd >}}

## [Context]{.teal} — the foundation {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s2-context.qmd >}}

## [Capabilities]{.amber} — what Claude acts on {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s2-capabilities.qmd >}}

## [Behaviors]{.coral} — how Claude operates {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s2-behaviors.qmd >}}

## [Agents]{.purple} — delegated execution {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s2-agents.qmd >}}

## A concrete project layout {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s2-project-layout.qmd >}}

## Plan first, then act {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s2-plan-first.qmd >}}

## [Section 3]{.amber}<br>Handy Tools {.dark-centered .center}

## Don't panic {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s3-dont-panic.qmd >}}

## Software stack {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s3-software-stack.qmd >}}

## Extensions taxonomy {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s3-extensions.qmd >}}

## Custom shell commands {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s3-shell-commands.qmd >}}

## The actual hardest skill {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s3-hardest-skill.qmd >}}

## Three takeaways {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/takeaways.qmd >}}

## Up next {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/up-next.qmd >}}
